metadata.description: Personal engineering skills overlay — design-layer practices that compose with general-purpose skill libraries.

plugins.name: personal-engineering-skills
plugins.description: Design-layer skills: system-design-docs (arc42-style evergreen design), architecture-diagrams (diagrams-as-code with C4), feature-design-doc (Google-style point-in-time design review), poc-production-fidelity (keep architectural boundaries, simplify runtime).
